description: Worktree branch names are inconsistent — agents produce agent-UUID, worktree-ID, bare ID, and ID/description variants. Test prompt changes to standardize on `<id>/<short-description>` (e.g. `bw-9s8/fix-wrap-bullets`). The convention should be stated once in the workflow step where worktrees are introduced.
title: Experiment: standardize worktree branch naming
